mapper.sql: id, board_id, user_id, post_title, post_content, post_tags, post_attach, view_count, like_count, comment_count, collect_count, is_top, is_hot, audit_status, audit_remark, is_public, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.insert: insert into forum_post (id, board_id, user_id, post_title, post_content, post_tags, post_attach, view_count, like_count, comment_count, collect_count, is_top, is_hot, audit_status, audit_remark, is_public, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{boardId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{postTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{postTags,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postAttach,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{viewCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{likeCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{commentCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{collectCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isTop,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isHot,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{auditStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{auditRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isPublic,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into forum_post
id, board_id, user_id, post_title, post_content, post_tags, post_attach, view_count, like_count, comment_count, collect_count, is_top, is_hot, audit_status, audit_remark, is_public, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{boardId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{postTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{postTags,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postAttach,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{viewCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{likeCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{commentCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{collectCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isTop,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isHot,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{auditStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{auditRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isPublic,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update: update forum_post set board_id = #{boardId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, post_title = #{postTitle,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post_content = #{postContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, post_tags = #{postTags,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post_attach = #{postAttach,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, view_count = #{viewCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, like_count = #{likeCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, comment_count = #{commentCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, collect_count = #{collectCount,jdbcType=BIGINT}, is_top = #{isTop,jdbcType=INTEGER}, is_hot = #{isHot,jdbcType=INTEGER}, audit_status = #{auditStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, audit_remark = #{auditRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_public = #{isPublic,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select p.*, b.board_name, u.nick_name, u.avatar from forum_post p left join forum_board b on p.board_id = b.id left join sys_user u on p.user_id = u.user_id where p.is_top = 1 and p.is_hot = 1 and p.audit_status = 1 and p.is_public = 1 order by p.create_time desc

select p.*, b.board_name, u.nick_name, u.avatar from forum_post p left join forum_board b on p.board_id = b.id left join sys_user u on p.user_id = u.user_id where (p.audit_status = 1 and p.is_public = 1) or p.user_id = #{userId} order by p.create_time desc limit #{limit}

select p.*, b.board_name, u.nick_name, u.avatar from forum_post p left join forum_board b on p.board_id = b.id left join sys_user u on p.user_id = u.user_id where p.user_id = #{userId} order by p.create_time desc limit #{limit}

select p.*, b.board_name, u.nick_name, u.avatar, (select count(1) from forum_interact where post_id = p.id and user_id = #{currentUserId} and type = 1) as is_liked, (select count(1) from forum_interact where post_id = p.id and user_id = #{currentUserId} and type = 2) as is_collected from forum_post p left join forum_board b on p.board_id = b.id left join sys_user u on p.user_id = u.user_id where p.id = #{id}
mapper.update: update forum_post set view_count = view_count + 1 where id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_post SET reply_count = reply_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND reply_count > 0 -- 防止减成负数
update forum_post set ${column} = ${column} - 1 where id = #{id} and ${column} > 0
